prose:
3D structure successfully built for water (H2O).

Method & provenance:
• Tool invoked: chemkit build-from-smiles (Open Babel v3.x, ―gen3d)
• Name resolved to SMILES "O" via PubChem (CID 962) and converted to 3-D coordinates with Open Babel’s geometry builder.
• Environment: gas phase (no solvent model). Charge 0, multiplicity 1 assumed for neutral closed-shell water.
• Output structure contains 3 atoms (2 H, 1 O). Coordinates are provided in the generated XYZ file at:
  /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/build-validation/water/20260619-141414_water_build/agent_call_01.xyz

No warnings were returned by the engine.
